intro: Welcome to KarmaOT. This compact guide helps you get started: hunt routes by city/level, essential quests, custom systems (Forge, Craft), daily bosses, and practical tips — all in the oldschool Tibia style.

levelRewards.title: How it works — Level Rewards
levelRewards.description: When you reach specific levels, each vocation receives a one-time reward. Rewards are organized by vocation and required level, with item icons displayed vertically for clarity.

guides.name: Annihilator I & II
guides.summary: Classic team annihilator quest. Requires coordination and strong gear around level 100+.

guides.name: Demon Helmet
guides.summary: Challenging quest rewarding the Demon Helmet. Recommended for experienced players.

guides.name: Horned Helmet
guides.summary: Quest for the Horned Helmet. A solid mid-level challenge.

guides.name: Golden Helmet
guides.summary: High-level quest for the legendary Golden Helmet.

guides.name: Angel Backpack & Golden Doll
guides.summary: Obtain the Angel Backpack and Golden Doll through this custom quest.

guides.name: Boots of Waterwalking
guides.summary: Quest for Boots of Waterwalking — walk on water surfaces.

guides.name: Pits of Inferno (POI)
guides.summary: Large multi-stage dungeon quest. Bring supplies and a team.

guides.name: Demona Warlock & Magician Cave
guides.summary: Warlock and magician hunting spot near Demona. High profit potential.

guides.name: Fury Gate – Carlin
guides.summary: Fury hunting area accessible through Carlin's Fury Gate.

guides.name: Yalahar Warlock Cave
guides.summary: Warlock cave in Yalahar with good experience and loot.

guides.name: Hydras Port Hope + Extension
guides.summary: Hydra hunting in Port Hope including the extension area.

guides.name: Hydras in Hydrana
guides.summary: Alternative hydra spawn in Hydrana for mid-high level players.

guides.name: Royal Castle Island
guides.summary: End-game hunting on Royal Castle Island.

guides.name: Barbarian Hunt
guides.summary: Barbarians Isle — high-level hunt with strong monsters and loot.

guides.name: Forge System
guides.summary: Custom forge system to upgrade and enhance your equipment.

guides.name: Craft System
guides.summary: Craft custom items using the KarmaOT crafting system.
